name: Praxair, Inc.
description: Praxair, Inc. was a leading global industrial gas company that produced, sold, and distributed atmospheric and process gases, as well as high-performance surface coatings. Headquartered in Danbury, Connecticut, the company served a diverse range of industries, including healthcare, petroleum refining, food and beverage, and aerospace. Praxair was known for its innovative gas applications and engineering solutions that improved environmental performance and energy efficiency. In 2018, Praxair completed a merger of equals with Linde AG to form Linde plc, creating the world's largest industrial gas and engineering company.
